phrases.label: Li-da Rose, I'm home again, Rose, about a thousand kisses shy
Ding, dong, ding, I can hear the chapel bell chime
Ding, dong, ding, at the least suggestion I'll pop the question to my name
Li-da Rose, now everyone knows that I am hoping you're the same
So here is my love song; not fancy or fine
Li-da Rose, Oh, won't you be mine? Lida Rose, oh, Lida Rose
